about.value: IILM University, Greater Noida, is a private university established in 1993. The college has 26 acres of lush green campus area. It is recognised by the UGC and affiliated with AKTU, Lucknow. The university was founded under the Uttar Pradesh Private University (Amendment) Act, 2022. It has been approved by AICTE and is accredited by NAAC and NBA. The institute offers several UG, PG, and PhD courses that include BA, BTech, BBA, BSc, BALLB, BBA LLB, MBA, MCA, LLM, MSc, MTech, MA, and PhD. The flagship courses of the IILM University are the BTech and MBA programs. The admission to the B.Tech program is based on the JEE-MAIN/CET ranks, and seats are allocated as per the JOSSA Counselling. Apart from BTech, IILM University, Greater Noida, also offers courses such as BCA, BBA, M.Tech, MBA, and LLM programs, among others, in the fields of Engineering, Management, and Science. The average tuition fees for the B.Tech 1st year are approximately INR 1.9 - 2.5 Lakhs, and the average tuition fees for the MBA 1st year are INR 4.4 - 6.5 Lakhs. IILM University, Greater Noida, placement statistics for 2025 have not been released yet. As per the 2024 data, the placement had a 100% placement assistance rate. In 2024, the highest package being offered was INR 24 LPA, and the average package stood at INR 8.6 LPA. More than 333+ offers were made during IILM University, Greater Noida placements 2024. Top recruiters include PwC, KPMG, Deloitte, Google, BlackRock, ITC Limited, LT, Godrej, EY, Kotak, HDFC Bank, Reliance, among others. The video provides an extensive virtual tour of ILM University, showcasing its facilities, infrastructure, and academic environment. The presenter highlights different areas of the campus, including classrooms, labs, a library, an incubation center, and auditoriums. Special emphasis is placed on the well-maintained, well-ventilated, and modern infrastructure that includes specialized labs for coding, biotechnology, and other technical fields, enhancing students’ learning experiences. The incubation center is presented as an innovation hub where students can develop startup ideas with guidance and mentorship.

about.value: IILM University, Greater Noida, offers a total number 82 UG, PG, and PhD courses in Engineering, Management, Arts, and Science. The admission to BTech is granted based on the CET/JEE-Main score, followed by Counselling. The admission process at IILM University, Greater Noida, is simple and student-friendly. Applicants can either register online or visit the campus in person to start their application. After registering, candidates fill out an online form and upload required documents such as mark sheets, certificates, and a passport-sized photo. Once the application is submitted, candidates are shortlisted based on their academic records and achievements. They will be invited for a personal interview, which may also include a written test or case study. Final selection is made based on the performance in the interview and academic background. The selected students have to pay the required fees to confirm their admission.

toc_sections.section: IILM University, Greater Noida Application Process 2025

content.value: The detailed IILM University Greater Noida admission process is mentioned below in a step-wise manner:

Step 1: Visit the official website iilm.edu.in and register yourself as a new applicant. An email with the login information will be sent to the registered email. Use these credentials for the further application process.
Step 2: Go to the “Apply Now” section to obtain the application form.
Step 3: Before beginning to fill the application form, write a “Statement of Purpose”. This must explain why the candidate should be selected, why he/she wants to join the university, etc.
Step 4: Fill out the detailed IILM University application form with personal details, academic details, statement of purpose, etc.
Step 5: Once the form is complete, upload the scanned, attested copies of all required documents.
Step 6: Pay the application fee and click on “Submit”. Take a printout of the form for future verification.
The following documents will be required for the application:
content.value_html: The following documents will be required for the application:

value: 2 sets of photocopies of class 10 mark sheets and certificates
2 sets of photocopies of class 12 mark sheets and certificates
2 sets of photocopies of graduation/diploma mark sheets and certificates

toc_sections.section: IILM University, Greater Noida 2025 FAQS

content.value: Ques. What is the admission process for IILM University, Greater Noida?
content.value_html: Ques. What is the admission process for IILM University, Greater Noida?

content.value: Ans. IILM University, Greater Noida, admission is done through an online application process. To apply for IILM University, Greater Noida admission, candidates need to appear for JEE-MAIN/CET, the national-level entrance tests.
content.value_html: Ans. IILM University, Greater Noida, admission is done through an online application process. To apply for IILM University, Greater Noida admission, candidates need to appear for JEE-MAIN/CET, the national-level entrance tests.

content.value: Ques. What are the Eligibility criteria for admission to M.Tech at IILM University, Greater Noida?
content.value_html: Ques. What are the Eligibility criteria for admission to M.Tech at IILM University, Greater Noida?

content.value: Ans. For admission to M.Tech at IILM University, Greater Noida, candidates must have passed a graduation. IILM University, Greater Noida, offers admissions based on a national-level entrance examination for M.Tech candidates who must have a valid score on the GATE.
content.value_html: Ans. For admission to M.Tech at IILM University, Greater Noida, candidates must have passed a graduation. IILM University, Greater Noida, offers admissions based on a national-level entrance examination for M.Tech candidates who must have a valid score on the GATE.

content.value: Ques. Does IILM University, Greater Noida, offer scholarships to its students?
content.value_html: Ques. Does IILM University, Greater Noida, offer scholarships to its students?

content.value: Ans. Yes, IILM University, Greater Noida, offers multiple scholarships to its students on various grounds.
content.value_html: Ans. Yes, IILM University, Greater Noida, offers multiple scholarships to its students on various grounds.

content.value: Ques. Does IILM University, Greater Noida, offer direct admission?
content.value_html: Ques. Does IILM University, Greater Noida, offer direct admission?

content.value: Ans. Yes, IILM University, Greater Noida offer direct admission. For admission in any of the courses, students should fill online form. Based on merit, candidates will get admission.
content.value_html: Ans. Yes, IILM University, Greater Noida offer direct admission. For admission in any of the courses, students should fill online form. Based on merit, candidates will get admission.

likes: Area was good as compared to other colleges. There was ground and sports facilities also.
Faculties and management was easy to reach and approach regarding any issues or challenges faced by the student.
I didn't feel much that they have to improve anything for me everything is good yet personally I don't have any problem with anything in the campus or college
The campus was literally very nyc and good
Faculty was very nyc in my department even they were very sweet and helpful for me but according to me they were helpful to everyone of us

they encourage us enough to learn new skills , for example they even in 1st semester we have been given some innovative projects to complete , now evenn thoughh we are copying it from several sourcess , the knowledge , that we're gaining is immensse.

frequent teach events are bein hosted by our management , it excites us and allows them to do something extra apart from studies and all , it keeps us joyed and what to say , various fest are also held , like garba nights were there during navaratri

friendly enviroment inside the campus , the hostel life is really good , though im not part of it , the food provided by college mess is quite impressive , and they have also installed some vending machines here and there inside the campus for us
The environment and teachers and quite better than others.
There's some social activities also available in which you can participate.
Cleanliness is good depending upon students whether they spread garbages in field or put it into dustbin.
IILM Greater Noida don't believe in discrimination and therefore we have proper cells to register complains if we face the same.
Expert or rather best expert faculties are there at our campus to teach us biotechnology as it is quite technical.
Our university infrastructure is super amazing as it has modern buildings but at the same time enough greenery as well to compensate.
I like the inner environment of the college
i like the infrastructure of this college
one thing i like the most is college our college faculty
Our University is located amid various other universities and therefore the crowd in and outside the college is young.
Faculties teach in a way that no student are left circumspect.
Placements are exemplary at our campus and nearly 80 or more percentage of students get placed every year.
My Overall experience at IILM University, Greater Noida was very good.
The faculties of IILM University was very experienced and supportive, and the curriculum was very well-structured in terms of Theoretical and practical learning.
I really like the infrastructure of my college, especially the campus, labs and library.
The campus is really beautiful, very green surrounded by beautiful trees big gardens, and quite and peaceful environment
Annual fest mosaic happens every year with full high energy and always tries to do something different each year. Ted talks and motivational speakers also come to enlighten students
The best thing is the faculty they are very friendly and understanding and tries to help student during competitions, studies personal issue.
I liked the infrastructure structure. Other college's classroom feels like normal school .
I also liked the faculty who are willing to help if you contact them . And not ignore your issues . We also have pur seperate mentor toh help us any time
Crowd is also decent currently cant say about future
dislikes: The security was not at that point during 2022 as anyone else from other colleges can enter in our college fest and on other events.
The Mess food was not during 2022, as sometimes there some insects or any type of things come in the food/platter that we cannot eat and the mess was also not hygienic sometime.
Some cringe 😬 people in the college but that's my problem that I thought them cringe not their friends
campus size is little small compared to other ones in our region ,
the attendance policy here is very bad , like students are getting debarred even if they are having 72% attendance
Girls and boys ratio is like 1:6 which quite low.
As compared to last year's addmission, the quantity of students increased this year.
Girls hostel in time as we are in campus and have to be at the hostels by 7.30 pm.
Placements still needs a lot of improvement especially for our branch.
there is only 4-5 classes perday which i dont like
when there is no classes then there will be vey less places for students for sitting and timepass
We have to come only 4 days in a week in this college
Internships college don't provide that and we have to find on our own.
Attendance are quite strict and also we hardly get opportunities to skip the classes.
Industry exposure for biotechnology students was very limited, more add-ons like internships or workshops will have added value.
Seating capacity for btech students is not good a huge crowd is only because of btech.
things i dislike includes is management. There is no different offices for different departments and fee submission becomes a headache
Also mess food is kind of average , but we have to often order online

about.value: IILM University, Greater Noida, placement is managed by the Corporate Resource Cell (CRC) of the university. The IILM University, Greater Noida, has released the placement statistics for the academic session 2023-24 on the official website. However, IILM University Placement 2024 successfully maintained a 100% placement assistance rate. In 2024, the highest package being offered was INR 24 LPA, and the average package stood at INR 8.6 LPA. Top recruiters at IILM University, Greater Noida are PWC, KPMG, Deloitte, Google, Blackrock, ITC Limited, LT, Godrej, EY, Kotak, HDFC Bank, Reliance, etc.

As per IILM University Greater Noida JEE-Main Cutoff 2021, the overall cutoff for B.Tech programs in Round 4 for AI Quota is 1758 - 369861, for HS Quota is 215371 - 552627, across all categories.

value: Scholarships begin in the 1st year of the program.

value: The aggregate percentage for eligibility will be calculated based on marks scored in English and three academic subjects (com pulsorily including subjects of eligibility), excluding Physical Education, Fine Arts, Performing Arts, or any Vocational/Non- Written subjects. Sports Scholarship Criteria
To be eligible for the Sports Scholarship, candidates must meet the following criteria:

1. Minimum Academic Eligibility: Applicants must fulfil the academic requirements outlined in the Admission Brochure for their respective program. Ensure you review the specific criteria for your chosen course to confirm eligibility.
2. Age Limit: Candidates must be 23 years old or younger as of July 31, 2025. This ensures that the scholarship supports young athletes in their educational journey.

3. Participation Requirement: Candidates must demonstrate regular participation in their chosen sport for a minimum of three years. This includes involvement in international, local, state, or national level competitions. Documentation, such as certificates or letters from coaches, may be required to verify participation and level of achievement

value: National Participants (Gold, Silver, Bronze positions only)

about.value: Continuation of Sports Scholarship
The Sports Scholarship is granted on an annual basis for the first year of the program. For continuation into the second and subsequent years, recipients must adhere to the following conditions:

1. Academic Performance: Scholars must maintain a minimum CGPA of 7 (or equivalent academic performance) and attendance of minimum 50% as specified in the scholarship policy. This ensures that student-athletes are balancing both their academic and athletic commitments effectively.

2. Sport Participation: Continued eligibility requires ongoing active participation in the respective sport. Scholars must engage in competitions and training, demonstrating commitment to their sport.

3. Review Process: Scholarship renewal will be subject to a review process at the end of each academic year. Recipients may be required to submit documentation of their academic performance and sports involvement.

4. Adherence to Policies: Scholars must comply with all institutional policies and regulations, including any specific requirements set forth in the scholarship policy. By meeting these criteria, scholars can secure their scholarship for the duration of their program, supporting their academic and athletic ambitions.

Martyr’s Scholarship 100% tuition fee waiver for Wards of Martyrs of the program. Criteria for Admission The Martyr’s Scholarship is designed to honor the sacrifices of those who have served the nation. To be eligible for this scholarship, candidates must meet the following criteria: 1. Academic Eligibility: Candidates must fulfill the minimum academic eligibility requirements for the respective program as outlined in the Admission Brochure. Candidates must also successfully pass through the selection process established by the institution. 2. Scholarship Amount: Selected students will receive a 100% scholarship on tuition fee, subject to the decision of the Scholarship Committee. 3. Fee Adjustment:

The scholarship will be awarded after the candidate joins the program. Any excess fee paid by the student will be adjusted against the academic fees of the following year. 4. Documentation Requirement: The qualifying act that led to the martyrdom must be in the line of duty. Applicants are required to submit documentary evidence to substantiate their application and justify the scholarship. 5. Eligibility for Wards of Martyrs: The scholarship provides a 100% tuition fee waiver for the first year of the program for the wards of martyrs from the following organizations:  Army  Navy  Air Force  Assam Rifles  Special Frontier Force  Indian Coast Guard  CRPF (Central Reserve Police Force)  BSF (Border Security Force)  ITBP (Indo-Tibetan Border Police)  CISF (Central Industrial Security Force)  SSB (Sashastra Seema Bal)  State Police
8. Fee Waivers
To promote gender equality and encourage female education, a fee waiver of 10% is available for female students enrolled in any program. Key details include:
1. Eligibility:
This waiver is applicable to female candidates who:
1. Have a family income of less than ₹8 lakhs per annum.

2. Income Certificate issued by competent authorities (e.g., Tehsildar, Revenue Officer)  For continuation of 10% fee waiver from second year onwards, students must: 1. Maintain a minimum 75% attendance record 2. Achieve a minimum of 7.5 CGPA
3. Clear all previous-year subjects
4. Adhere to the institution’s code of conduct
5. Meet program-specific requirements (if applicable)
To support students from diverse backgrounds, the following fee waivers are offered
1.10% Fee Waiver for Applicants from Kashmir & North East India: (First year tuition fee)
This waiver is available to candidates who are residents of Jammu and Kashmir or any of the North Eastern states of India
2.10% Fee Waiver for Children of Defence Personnel:( First year tuition fee )
Children of active or retired defence personnel are eligible for a 10% fee waiver to acknowledge their contributions and sacrifices.
3.10% Fee Waiver for Applicants from Nepal: ( First year tuition fee )
Applicants from Nepal will receive a 30% fee waiver to encourage international students to pursue their education with us.
4.10% Fee Waiver for Siblings: ( First year tuition fee)
The Fee waiver applies to siblings of currently enrolled students at the institution.
Important Notes:
For the second year onwards, continuation of any scholarships will be subject to Scholarship Continuation Policy.
These initiatives aim to make education more accessible to students from various backgrounds and promote a diverse learning environment.
9. Fees Concession for Students of Haryana Domicile
In accordance with Section 35 & 36 of the Haryana Private Universities Act, 2006, IILM University offers fee concessions to students who are residents of Haryana
Qualifying Examination and Eligibility Criteria

value: UG – Class XII with 90% & above and Family Income less than 3 Lakhs Per Annu
UG – Class XII with 80% & above and Family Income less than 6 Lakhs Per Annum
UG – Class XII or PG- Graduation with 75% & above and Family Income less than 8 Lakhs Per Annum

about.value: Reservation and Fee Structure for Students from Haryana
100% tuition fee waiver for Wards of Martyrs of the program
A minimum of 25% of seats for admissions at the university shall be reserved for students of the State of Haryana.
Within this quota, 10% of the seats shall be specifically reserved for students belonging to the Scheduled Castes of Haryana.
The fee structure for the 25% of students who are domiciles of Haryana shall be based on a merit- cum-means approach and shall be allocated as follows:
1. One-fifth (20%) of the 25% reserved seats shall be granted a full fee concession.
2. Two-fifths (40%) of the 25% reserved seats shall be granted a 50% fee concession.
3. The remaining two-fifths (40%) of the 25% reserved seats shall be granted a 25% fee concession
This structure aims to promote access to education for students from Haryana, ensuring that financial constraints do not hinder their academic pursuits
Documents needed: The documents for submission in case of those students seeking fee concession under Sec 36 of the Act, are as follows
For continuation of fee waiver from the second year onwards, students must:-
Maintain a minimum 75% attendance record
Clear all previous-year subjects
Adhere to the institution’s code of conduct
Meet program-specific requirements (if applicable)
Continuation of Admission Scholarships

Scholarships are awarded on an annual basis, and eligibility for subsequent years of the program is contingent upon adherence to the scholarship policy. To ensure continued support, recipients must meet the following criteria:
1.100% Scholarship:
 Students must attain a position within the top 5% of the merit list for their program.
 Maintain a minimum CGPA of 9.0 or higher.
2. 70% to 90% Scholarship:
 Students are required to consistently rank within the top 15% of the merit list.
 Maintain a minimum CGPA of 8.0 or higher
3. 40% to 60% Scholarships:
 Recipients must secure a spot in the top 10% of the merit list.
 Maintain a minimum CGPA of 8.5 or higher.
4. 10% to 30% Scholarships:
 Students are required to consistently rank within the top 20% of the merit list.
 Maintain a minimum CGPA of 8.0 or higher
5. Attendance and Conduct:
 Students must maintain an attendance rate exceeding 75% in each semester.
 They should not face any academic or disciplinary restrictions during their course of study
By adhering to these criteria, students can continue to benefit from their scholarships, supporting their educational journey and academic excellence
Important Scholarship Notes

Single Scholarship Policy:  Students are not eligible to receive a combination of scholarships and concessions. Only one type of scholarship or concession may be availed, and you will receive the option that offers the greater benefit. 2. Application Requirements:  To be considered for a scholarship, applications must be submitted with complete details in the prescribed format, along with the necessary Sports/Martyr Certificates and relevant documents. Incomplete applications will not be processed and will be cancelled. 3. Exclusions:  Please note that scholarships in any category do not cover the costs of boarding and lodging 4. Fee Payment Process:  In all scholarship categories, students are initially required to pay the full fees. Any excess amount resulting from the scholarship will be adjusted against the payment for Semester-II. 2. Approval Process:  The grant of scholarships is subject to the approval of the Scholarship Committee. 3. Limited Availability:  A limited number of scholarship seats are available, and they are granted on a first-come, first- served basis. Early application is encouraged. 4. Application Deadline:  The deadline for applying for scholarships for all programs is August 31, 2025. Please ensure that your application is submitted by this date to be considered for a scholarship

qna.question: IILM vs AMITY, which is a better college?

answers.author: SN
answer: Among these two IILM is definitely the better college. Amity has a huge student intake, so it’s difficult to get the required attention from faculties. While the small batch size of IILM ensures that everyone gets proper attention. IILM also has a strong mentoring program.
IILM course curriculum is globally benchmarked. Course modules are inspired by top business schools in the world like Wharton Business School, Stanford Graduate School of Business, and IIMA.
The liberal educational approach of IILM also gives students the freedom and flexibility to explore their passion.

answers.author: SV
answers.qualification: PGDM Marketing & International Business, IILM Institute for Higher Education (2013)
answer: IILM imparts quality education and produces a number of scholars, professionals, and entrepreneurs with every passing year. Here are some of the reasons on why IILM is a better option than Amity.
Accreditation : IILM is an AICTE approved and accredited by the NBA (National Board of Accreditation). It has been ranked 11th Best Indian B-School by Eduniversal.

Campus: The centrally located Hi-Tech campus is in the heart of the knowledge hub in Greater Noida. It is situated in a 27 Acre lush green, eco-friendly, Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The entire campus is under CCTV surveillance.
Laboratories: They are NBA accredited and are highly sophisticated with high-class infrastructure.

Students Residences : The students, as well as faculty, are given on-campus housing facilities for over 500 capacity. The residences are Air-conditioned, Wi-Fi enabled with power backup with all basic amenities.
Faculty : There are over 80 full-time faculty with immense industrial and research experience. The faculty are highly qualified from institutions like IIT, BITS, JNU, IIM , DU, etc.
Alumni base : There are more than 3000 well-placed alumni spread all across the globe.
Categories
IILM
Amity
Course Fee (approx.)
12.9 lakhs
22.81 lakhs
Placement Percentage
Highest CTC
27 LPA
15 LPA
Average CTC
8 LPA
7 LPA

More than 300 leading companies visited the campus of Greater Noida for the placement drive. Firms such as Wipro, Accenture, HCL, Syntel, Mankind Pharma, Nutrilife, recruited the IILM graduates for placements. For internships, companies like GAIL, Volkswagen, BHEL, HAL, Tata Motors, HCL, NTPC, Coca-Cola, IARI, DRDO, and AIIMS recruited students.
If you are apprehensive and looking for an institute to grow, then IILM is the right choice.

qna.question: Out of BIMTECH, Jaipuria, IILM which one's better?

answers.author: AB
answer: BIMTECH is a 34-year-old private b-school located in Greater Noida for MBA aspirants. The college is backed by the legendary Birla Group. BIMTECH is largely preferred over other colleges in the same bracket by the aspirants for its beautiful fully-residential campus that distinguishes it from other B-schools in the same league.

Established in 2004, Jaipuria Institute of Management (JIM), Noida has completed almost 20 years of excellence in management education. JIM is ranked 28th amongst Private B-Schools in India by CSR-GHRDC, 2022, and 51st amongst all Management Institutes of India by NIRF rankings of 2022.

Jaipuria Noida offers flagship two-year full-time AICTE Approved, NBA accredited and AIU-recognised PGDM programs (PGDM, PGDM (SM), and PGDM (MARKETING) and Doctoral level Fellow Program in Management.

IILM Institute for Higher Education, established in 1993, offers PGDM courses. The college has been ranked 120 in the NIRF rankings for 2022 and 11th Best Indian B-school in Eduniversal rankings. It has other two branches in Delhi-NCR which offer degrees in other streams and courses.
The table below shows the placement packages of all three institutions:
Particulars
Highest Package 2022
Average package 2022
BIMTECH
18 Lakhs
9.38 Lakhs
JIM
19.18 Lakhs
11.49 Lakhs
IILM
18 Lakhs
7.5 Lakhs
BIMTECH seems to be the better choice among the three options as it has a better placement record and a legacy of being a 34-year-old institute with an amazing alumni base.

qna.question: Which is better, IILM or NIET?

answers.author: AG
answers.qualification: Studied Master of Business Administration Degrees at IILM University, Gurugram
answer: For technical courses, NIET is the best option in the region. It has an excellent engineering faculty. It has a decent placement record as well. Over the last few years, the institute has maintained a record 100% placement rate. Leading companies such as Intel, HCL, Google, etc. recruit through NIET placements. The highest CTC offered is around INR 44 LPA.

answers.author: AK
answers.qualification: Bachelor in Technology in Civil Engineering, Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET) (Graduated 2015)
answer: Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET) Greater Noida, is one of the popular technical colleges. The institute ranked at 1st position in Greater Noida and at 6th position in North India for its Engineering faculty. IILM Academy of Higher Learning (Greater Noida) is a private institute that has been approved by AICTE and is accredited by NAAC.
Admissions:
Noida Institute of Engineering and Technology (NIET):
Admission to B.Tech and M.Tech is based on UPSEE or Institute Admission Test
Admission of MBA is based on scores of CAT/MAT/XAT/ CMAT/ GMAT or any National Entrance Exams
NIET also conduct entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to any of the courses.
IILM:
Admission to all the courses of IILM is done on the basis of marks obtained in UPSEE
UPSEE is an entrance exam conducted by AKTU, Lucknow.
M.tech admissions are based on score GATE
Admission of MBA is based on scores of CAT/MAT/XAT and a personal interview conducted by the University
IILM also offers direct admission through management quota.
Campus:
NIET: It has a campus area of 13.90 acres with lush green ambiance and Three hostels that offer well ventilated and comfortable rooms and common recreational areas.
IILM: It has 3 centrally located campuses in New Delhi, Gurugram, and Greater Noida with A+ residential hostels and facilities.
Placement:
NIET:
The college has a placement rate of almost 100% over the last 4 years.
Top recruiters of NIET are KPMG, Bharti Airtel, ICICI Bank, Naukri.com, Snap Deal, Angel Broking, and more visit the campus for placements.
The average placement package offered is 3.8 LPA, with the highest package going up to 11 LPA.
IILM:
The college has a placement rate of almost 80% for the batch of 2017-2018.
Students of IILM offers placement opportunities in more than 125 companies including New Era, NIIT, Bajaj Allianz, Usha, Business Standard, naukri.com, and many more
The average placement package offered is 2.68 LPA, with the highest package going up to 10 LPA

Choosing which college is better is difficult as Both colleges are equally good in terms of academics and placements. Prospective students can choose the college which offers a better program for the course they wish to apply for.

qna.question: What is better, IBS Hyderabad or IILM?

answers.author: HS
answer: It can be concluded that IBS Hyderabad is a better choice than IILM University based on the placement percentage, the average package offered, the highest international and domestic packages offered, and the top recruiters. IBS Hyderabad recorded a placement percentage of 99% with an average package offered of INR 8.71 LPA and a rise in the highest international package offered as compared to 2021. On the other hand, IILM University had a lower highest and average package offered at INR 18 LPA and INR 7.50 LPA, respectively.

Additionally, IBS Hyderabad has a strong brand value with over 58,000 alumni employed globally, while IILM University has limited brand recognition. The brand value of IBS Hyderabad, as an established B-School, contributes to better graduate placement opportunities through its alumni network and strong corporate relationships. In comparison, IILM University is not as well-known and its graduates may face limitations in terms of job opportunities. These factors highlight the superiority of IBS Hyderabad as a better option for those looking to pursue a management degree.

qna.question: Which one is better among IILM Greater Noida, UWSB Kolkata or ISME Bangalore?

answers.author: JB
answer: After going through the reviews about these colleges, It is suggested that you should go ahead with United World School of Business Kolkata. Here are some of the reasons as to why:
The college is located in the heart of the city in the IT sector. Because of this, it will be easier for many corporations to visit the college regularly.
United World School of Business Kolkata is also a national level B school. It also has its presence in other cities like Ahmedabad.
The infrastructure is quite good. You will notice that it almost looks like a corporate house.
Many of the faculty members of the college are from Ivy league B-schools. They are very well versed in their academics and have good industry exposure.
Many top-notch companies like ITC, PwC, Nestle, Kotak Mahindra, Indusind, Emami, Asian Paints, etc.
Categories
United World School of Business Kolkata
Course Fee
5.5 lakh
Highest CTC
15 LPA
Average CTC
4-6 LPA
All these points above might help you make a decision towards UWSB Kolkata. Ultimately it is your choice to make the decision. Hope this helps.

qna.question: What should I go for if I have two options PGDM in insurance and banking from BIMTECH or PGDM in marketing and finance from IILM Gurgaon or IILM Noida?

answers.author: HK
answer: If you want to shift abroad after your MBA or want an international experience during your MBA life, then you can definitely take admission at any average Canadian university. However, you need to take the cost of the entire program into account. On average the total cost will be around $40,000 (INR 30 lakhs) which includes expenses such as tuition fees, housing, food, and other things.

So either you need to be rich enough to afford this or you must be a good student with good academics so that you can lower your cost through scholarships. In comparison BIMTECH Greater Noida is relatively cheap with good college life, the quality of education is also good and you will get similar levels of opportunity to uncover your skills and talents. The tuition fee is given below.
Merit students – INR 11,50,000
International students – INR 12,00,000
Corporate-sponsored, NRI, and NRI sponsored students – INR 17,00,000
In terms of placements, it is also good. Take a look at the placement stats for the year 2020.
Highest domestic salary – INR 18 lakhs per annum by Amazon
Highest international salary – INR 23 lakhs per annum by Landmark Inc. Dubai
Average salary of top 100 students – INR 10.03 lakhs per annum
Companies visited – 100+

The campus hosts many events and other things to keep you engaged all year. If you intend to work in India I do not see any point in doing an MBA from abroad. Make an informed decision based on all things talked about here.

qna.question: Which one is better for an MBA in marketing, PIBM Pune or IILM Noida/Gurgaon?

answers.author: SG
answer: PIBM and IILM are both good institutes when it comes to MBA or management studies. IILM is comparatively old and also has a legacy of more than 25 years which gives it an edge over PIBM Pune. Moreover IILM has 3 campuses in the Delhi and Noida region and also in cities like Jaipur, Lucknow etc. IILM is the better of the two due to the reasons below.
Curriculum: Its curriculum has been widely accepted and has been globally recognized adding to its list of achievements.
Location: Its location brings it closer to the industries with tons of job opportunities. Also, it is located near the capital of the country.
Alumni Network: Strong alumni network of more than 15000+ students who are present globally in almost every MNC.
Placements: More than 300 companies visit the campus drive every year for placements. According to the recent placement highlights the highest CTC offered at the institute is 5 LPA.
Higher Studies Abroad: It has tie-ups with some of the leading institutes of the USA and UK. Students can go to summer studies camp or for a special course.
Industrial Partners: Industrial exposure is given to the students by leading industrialists and seminars and webinars are conducted on a regular basis.
Based on all the above factors, I will suggest you choose IILM Noida for an MBA in Marketing.

qna.question: What is the eligibility for M.Tech in IILM, Greater Noida?

answers.author: DD
answer: One of my close friends studied M.Tech in IILM, Greater Noida, and here's what she has to share about the institute -
For M.Tech, you should have a B.Tech degree from a recognized university.
Admissions will be offered based on their academic performance.

Engineering graduates securing minimum eligibility marks (as per the norms of GBTU, Lucknow, and MTU, Noida) from any recognized University/ College are eligible to apply for M.Tech at IILM, Greater Noida.
For more details and a clear picture, check the official website and contact the admission office.

qna.question: Which is better among the Asia Pacific, IILM, and BIMTECH?

answers.author: AB
answer: Choose IILM. Faculties are knowledgeable and always willing to help. They've transformed students' thinking from problem-solving to solution-finding. Since you live on campus at IILM GSM, you are almost never late to class. Living with your coursemates is great because you get to know everyone so well.

All students get a thorough outline of what will be taught and what they need to read for the class through NEO LMS. Most of the homework is turned in online mode. The faculty members include everyone in the case talk in the classroom.
